published_prior_art.cite: LeeGhassamiShpitser2024DataFusionSelection: general systematic-selection identification algorithm subsumes the positive soundness setting, but not the named source-cover certificate

LeeGhassamiShpitser2024DataFusionSelection: gives a general systematic-selection ID algorithm and hedge/thicket-style failure analysis in all but one failure case; source-minimal overlap hedge may be a refinement
ShpitserPearl2008CompleteID and CorreaTianBareinboim2018Adjustment: ordinary ID and adjustment reductions

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The LeeGhassamiShpitser2024DataFusionSelection comparison underplays its failure-certificate layer: the paper states SS-ID failure returns hedge/thicket-style witnesses and proves nonidentification in all but one failure case, so the proposal must separate overlap hedges from those witnesses, not from a mere generic failure trace.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The witness-layer comparison should add the gID/thicket lineage that Lee 2024 explicitly builds on, especially Lee-Correa-Bareinboim g-identifiability and Kivva et al. 2022 positivity-corrected gID; without that comparison the flagship novelty over published witness machinery is not established.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship unless the revision identifies a published open failure case in Lee 2024/gID and proves the source-cover overlap hedge closes that exact gap rather than specializing known systematic-selection machinery.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a table comparing source-cover failure against Lee 2024 SS-ID failure cases, naming which line/case is not already handled by hedge or thicket constructions and what extra invariance the overlap hedge preserves.

Add Lee-Correa-Bareinboim gID and Kivva et al. 2022 to Related work and explain whether source-cover inputs violate their full-distribution input requirements or only repackage their thicket obstruction.

Promote to a flagship target by isolating one concrete open case from Lee 2024, such as the remaining unproved completeness failure case, and state Conjecture 1 as solving that case for the observational factor-local overlap-ancestral subclass.

recommended_next_step: Revise the published-axis novelty claim around Lee 2024 and gID/thicket prior art; the structure and well-posedness otherwise pass.
